IssueID: ISS-001
Severity: high
Scope: README.md
Problem: README.md is missing in the package root.
Evidence: target-package/ contains no README.md
RequiredFix: Create README.md at package root with project name on line 1 and one-sentence description on line 2.
Verify: README.md exists at package root with at least 2 non-empty lines.

IssueID: ISS-002
Severity: medium
Scope: package.json
Problem: package.json has no "version" field.
Evidence: target-package/package.json lacks "version"
RequiredFix: Add "version": "0.1.0" to the top-level JSON object of package.json.
Verify: parse package.json and confirm version equals "0.1.0".
